title: crassocephalum luteum
intro: Crassocephalum luteum, also known as yellow pot herb, is a tropical plant species native to Africa and Asia, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crassocephalum luteum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves can also be crushed and applied topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
